purpose: Constrain 4.0 low-fidelity game interface design briefs before LLM draws inside the Figma template scaffold.

rules.elementIdsRequired: Every region, control, state, and feedback item must have a stable id so notes and flows can reference it.
rules.playerVisibleOnly: Wireframes describe player-visible UI states, controls, and feedback, not backend logic diagrams or mechanism summaries.
rules.sourceOrPending: Every visible element must be source-backed or referenced by AI pending-confirmation notes.
rules.leftFrameOnly: Renderer draws inside the template left frame and must not replace the frame shell.
rules.layoutIntentOptional: surfaceType/layoutIntent may guide LLM thinking, but they must not let renderer code replace LLM interface design with a generic list.
rules.systemMechanismPlacement: Background refresh/reset/settlement mechanisms should be represented as related interface states, feedback, mail/reminder, or notes, not as standalone player flow wireframes.
